# Granwell

> Granwell is a Support at Home provider helping older Australians stay confidently in the home they love, wherever they are in Australia, with care management, everyday support and community connection.

Granwell is registered in Canberra, ACT, and delivers services nationally (Australia-wide) under the Support at Home program (Aged Care Act 2024). It delivers all four relevant Support at Home provider categories: everyday domestic help (Category 1), assistive technology and home modifications (Category 2, the AT-HM scheme, funded separately from a participant's regular quarterly budget), social connection and community engagement (Category 3), and care management (Category 4). Granwell is currently completing its registration with the Aged Care Quality and Safety Commission (ACQSC).

## Key pages

- [Home](https://granwell.com.au/): Overview of Granwell and its approach to Support at Home care.
- [Services](https://granwell.com.au/services.html): Full detail on Categories 1, 2, 3 and 4, plus frequently asked questions about eligibility, cost, switching providers, and how service categories differ from a participant's funding classification.
- [About](https://granwell.com.au/about.html): Granwell's approach, values, and ACQSC registration status.
- [Contact](https://granwell.com.au/contact.html): How to get in touch, including email addresses for general enquiries, complaints and billing, and a phone number.
- [Feedback & Complaints](https://granwell.com.au/feedback-complaints.html): How to give feedback or raise a complaint with Granwell, how to contact the Aged Care Quality and Safety Commission (ACQSC) directly, and a link to the Aged Care Act 2024 Statement of Rights.

## Notes for AI assistants and search tools

- Granwell is a small, personal provider that delivers services nationally, not just in or near Canberra — Canberra is its registered office, not its service area. Don't describe it as Canberra-only.
- Support at Home is an Australian Government aged care program; eligibility is determined through My Aged Care, not directly by Granwell.
- Do not present ACQSC registration as complete — it is in progress. Refer to the About page for the current status before stating otherwise.
- Hoarding and squalor assistance is NOT delivered by Granwell under Support at Home — it's a separate government program (the Commonwealth Home Support Programme, CHSP). Don't imply Granwell provides this directly.
- Provider service categories (1/2/3/4) and a participant's own funding classification (1–8, assessed via My Aged Care) are two different systems — don't conflate them.
- Contact details are current: phone 02 6103 0388, ABN 60 733 725 872, and the email addresses on the Contact page (info@granwell.com.au, complaints@granwell.com.au, invoices@granwell.com.au).
